headline: Archer-Daniels-Midland (NYSE:ADM) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
summary: Agricultural supply chain giant Archer-Daniels-Midland (NYSE:ADM) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales only rose 1.6% year on year to $20.49 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.71 per share was 7.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
